panduan.title: Farming Guide
panduan.subtitle: Circular agriculture education hub. Learn to transform farm waste into valuable products, watch field practice videos, and gather LoopPoints for premium rewards!
panduan.pointsToNext: Earn {points} more LoopPoints to upgrade to {next} tier
panduan.pointsEarnedToast: +{points} LoopPoints successfully added to your balance!

uploadModal.title: Share Practical Guide
uploadModal.description: Help other farmers grow by sharing guide articles or field practice videos. Earn +50 LoopPoints for your contribution!

redeemPoints.title: Claim Exclusive Rewards
redeemPoints.subtitle: Redeem your LoopPoints for sales commission waivers or discounts on farming supplies.
redeemPoints.option1Desc: Commission discount for your next processed waste sales transaction in LoopTani.
redeemPoints.option2Desc: Direct discount on purchasing liquid organic fertilizer, compost, or selected secondhand tools.
redeemPoints.redeemSuccess: Successfully redeemed {reward}! Your LoopPoints balance has been deducted.
